author: phase-4-coordinator
content: Fixed. Cross-sign ULP distance now masks off the IEEE 754 sign bit explicitly (a.to_bits() & !F64_SIGN_MASK) + (b.to_bits() & !F64_SIGN_MASK) instead of casting to i64 and taking unsigned_abs. The old code mixed sign-magnitude floats with two's-complement arithmetic and overstated cross-sign distances by up to 2^53. Same-sign branch also switched to u64 subtraction with max/min to avoid the as-i64-then-subtract pattern. Added compile-time constants F64_SIGN_MASK and F32_SIGN_MASK. 12 new self-tests cover: equal values, signed zeros, 1-ULP step, NaN returns None, cross-sign for ±1, cross-sign symmetry across a range of pairs, cross-sign monotonicity, near-zero noise floor, and the same set for f32. All 17 ferray-linalg oracle tests and 50 ferray-ufunc oracle tests still pass — the fix strictly tightens the cross-sign distance, so existing tolerances remain valid.
